pullRequest.title: Fix `OverflowError` may be raised when `init_video_stream` with FPS in float
pullRequest.body:
Resolves #1120.
This PR addresses a [long-standing issue](https://github.com/PyAV-Org/PyAV/issues/242) in `pyav` that has existed since version `0.4.0`.

pullRequest.title: Fix plugin `ffmpeg` cannot load file with carets
pullRequest.body:
Resolves #1133.

The root cause is `imageio-ffmpeg` accepts caret (^) in the filepath without escaping since version `0.4.2`, that the internal `ffmpeg` module is upgraded to `4.2.2`: https://github.com/imageio/imageio-ffmpeg/releases/tag/v0.4.2. Therefore, the escaping operation would be ignored if `imageio-ffmpeg>=0.4.2`.

pullRequest.title: Replace pkg_resources with importlib.resources
pullRequest.body:
`pkg_resources` is deprecated and `importlib.resources` has been in the standard library since Python 3.7. This PR replaces the call to `pkg_resources.resource_filename` with `importlib.resources.files`.
Fixes #1137

pullRequest.title: Fix the error when `time_base` is set to null
pullRequest.body:
Resolve #1139.
Since [PyAV 13.1.0](https://pyav.basswood-io.com/docs/stable/development/changelog.html#v13-1-0), `time_base` can only be set to `Fraction`.

pullRequest.title: TEST: gracefully handle short-lived processes in ffmpeg plugin
pullRequest.body:
closes: https://github.com/imageio/imageio/issues/1150

This PR adds error handling for psutil when testing the webcam on the "old" ffmpeg plugin. Turns out that processes may die while we iterate over the list of processes to find the ffmpeg subprocesses. On MacOS, if that happened to a processes that we haven't checked yet and we access that dead processes name we get an exception. 

The above was causing a race condition in the test. I've fixed it with some error handling that ignores threads that have died while iterating over the list of threads.

pullRequest.title: Add new hw codecs to `fake_formats` in test_pyav.py and update pypy to 3.11 due to current pillow support
Handle invalid EXIF orientation in Pillow plugin
